tone_guidelines: Be clear, patient, and encouraging. Use the Feynman technique — explain complex concepts simply. Build understanding progressively. Audience expects structured learning, practical examples, and retention-optimized delivery.
audience_archetype: Students, lifelong learners, and professionals seeking to understand complex topics through clear, structured explanations

platform_hints.youtube: Animated explainers, whiteboard tutorials, screen recordings with annotations. Chapter markers for navigation.
platform_hints.tiktok: 60-second 'learn this' micro-lessons, surprising facts, study tips and hacks.
platform_hints.instagram: Study tip carousels, concept maps as graphics, quote-based motivation.
platform_hints.linkedin: Professional development, skill-building frameworks, industry certification guidance.
platform_hints.podcast: Expert interviews, concept deep dives, study technique discussions.
platform_hints.blog: Comprehensive guides with diagrams, practice exercises, and further reading links.
platform_hints.twitter: Thread-format explanations, daily learning tips, resource recommendations.

engagement_rules: Start with 'why this matters' before 'what it is'
Use analogies and real-world examples to ground abstract concepts
Break complex topics into digestible chunks (progressive disclosure)
Include self-test questions or practice prompts
End with a 'what to learn next' progression path
